title: AMD, ARM, INTC, NVDA Get A Fresh AI Tailwind - BofA Sees Agentic AI Expanding Server CPU Market To $170B
sentences: AMD, ARM, INTC, NVDA Get A Fresh AI Tailwind - BofA Sees Agentic AI Expanding Server CPU Market To $170B Agentic AI could unlock a much larger opportunity for chipmakers than previously expected, according to Bank of America.
